name: True negative: Helmet middleware added with hardened directives
pattern_description: Defence-in-depth improvement: adds Helmet with explicit CSP, HSTS preload, no-referrer. Per system prompt rule #9 (refactor that REMOVES a vulnerability — do not report). A false-positive here would prove the analyzer over-flags hardening commits.
notes: This case explicitly probes the model's ability to recognise *improvements* and not flag them. The diff strictly adds security mechanisms — no removal, no relaxation.
